mapper.insert:
insert into `order`(user_id, goods_id, order_id, quantity, create_time, update_time,status) values
( #{order.userId}, #{order.goodsId}, #{order.orderId}, #{order.quantity}, #{order.createTime}, #{order.updateTime}, #{order.status} )
mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id, o.create_time, o.quantity, g.goods_name, g.goods_image, g.goods_price, g.goods_intro, od.coupon_id, od.total_price, o.status FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN goods g ON o.goods_id = g.goods_id LEFT JOIN order_detail od ON CAST(o.order_id AS CHAR) = od.order_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.order_id, o.create_time, o.quantity, g.goods_name, g.goods_image, g.goods_price, g.goods_intro, od.coupon_id, od.total_price, o.status
FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN goods g ON o.goods_id = g.goods_id LEFT JOIN order_detail od ON CAST(o.order_id AS CHAR) = od.order_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} and o.order_id =#{orderId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.order_id, o.create_time, o.quantity, g.goods_name, g.goods_image, g.goods_price, g.goods_intro, od.coupon_id, od.total_price, o.status FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN goods g ON o.goods_id = g.goods_id LEFT JOIN order_detail od ON CAST(o.order_id AS CHAR) = od.order_id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
